text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of disorientation, as though I am on the threshold between familiar order and an uncertain journey. The empty corridor, the angled perspective, and the subdued colors create a strange, almost liminal atmosphere. In the second scene, the vibrant wall and the concept of research and development awaken my curiosity. I am drawn to the interplay between technology and human experience, and I feel a quiet excitement at the possibilities of discovery in this space. Together, these moments make me feel both unmoored and inspired, caught between uncertainty and the promise of innovation.
